seoTitle: How to Use Trello and Slack Together
metaDescription: Connect Trello and Slack so card updates stream into channels automatically, and learn slash commands for managing cards from chat.
intro: Keeping a team aligned often means bouncing between Slack conversations and Trello boards all day. This guide covers linking the two so project updates land directly in your Slack channels, plus how to manage cards using slash commands without leaving chat.

steps.heading: Open the Slack App Directory
steps.body: In your target channel, click Apps or Add Apps in the sidebar to reach Slack's application folder.

steps.heading: Add the Trello app
steps.body: Search for Trello, select the official listing, and click Add to Slack to begin the installation.

steps.heading: Authorize the integration
steps.body: Review the permissions screen and click Allow to approve the connection between Slack and Trello.

steps.heading: Link your account with a slash command
steps.body: In your Slack channel, type /trello link and follow the prompt to log into your Atlassian account and complete the connection.

steps.heading: Add the Slack Power-Up in Trello
steps.body: On your Trello board, click Power-Ups, add the Slack integration, and choose which channel should receive updates.

steps.heading: Select your notification triggers
steps.body: Check the boxes for events like card moves or comments, save your settings, and run a quick test to confirm it's working.

faq.question: Can I create Trello cards directly from Slack?
faq.answer: Yes, using Trello slash commands like /trello, you can create, assign, and interact with cards without leaving your Slack channel.

faq.question: How do I avoid too many notifications in my channel?
faq.answer: You can adjust the Slack Power-Up settings in Trello to only trigger alerts for specific events, like card moves or comments.

faq.question: Do I need to be a Trello board admin to set this up?
faq.answer: You'll need permission to add Power-Ups to the board and to authorize the Slack app in your workspace.

faq.question: Can I preview a Trello card right inside a Slack message?
faq.answer: Yes, once connected, shared card links often expand into live previews inside your Slack conversation.
